parameters.query:
-- Promedios diarios de los últimos 7 días para el área
SELECT
  date_trunc('day', timestamp) as dia,
  ROUND(AVG(reading)::numeric, 4) as avg_reading,
  ROUND(AVG(ema)::numeric, 4) as avg_ema,
  COUNT(*) as muestras,
  ROUND(MAX(reading)::numeric, 4) as max_reading,
  ROUND(MIN(reading)::numeric, 4) as min_reading
FROM energy_history
WHERE area = '{{ $json.body.area || $json.area }}'
  AND timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
GROUP BY dia
ORDER BY dia ASC;

-- Verificar si ya existe orden de mantenimiento reciente para esta área
SELECT id, timestamp, prioridad
FROM mantenimiento_preventivo
WHERE area = '{{ $('Webhook Mantenimiento').first().json.body.area || $('Webhook Mantenimiento').first().json.area }}'
  AND timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
  AND estado = 'pendiente'
LIMIT 1;

INSERT INTO mantenimiento_preventivo
  (area, tipo, tendencia_diaria_pct, dias_detectados, ema_inicio, ema_actual, prioridad, recomendacion)
VALUES ($1, 'degradacion_gradual', $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7)
RETURNING id;

INSERT INTO agent_decisions (agent_name, decision_type, area, output_data, action_taken)
VALUES ('maintenance', $1, $2, $3, $4);
